summary: Running/Course à Pied feature fully tested. All 11 backend API tests passed. Frontend Running page verified with all 3 tabs (Run, History, Stats) working. Admin Running section verified with global stats, Top Runners, and Recent Runs visible.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/running/log - Creates running session successfully
Backend: GET /api/running/history - Returns user's running history
Backend: GET /api/running/stats - Returns user's running statistics (total_runs, total_distance, best_pace, etc.)
Backend: GET /api/running/{run_id} - Returns specific run details
Backend: DELETE /api/running/{run_id} - Deletes run and verifies 404 on re-fetch
Backend: GET /api/admin/running/all - Returns all runs from all users
Backend: GET /api/admin/running/stats - Returns global stats and top runners
Backend: GET /api/admin/running/user/{user_id} - Returns specific user's running data
Frontend: /running page accessible and loads correctly
Frontend: Run tab - Shows START button, distance, duration, pace, calories displays, GPS standby
Frontend: History tab - Shows run history with 4 runs (6.00km, 4.20km, 3.50km, 5.20km)
Frontend: Stats tab - Shows total km (18.9), runs (4), time (1:45:00), calories (1134), progress chart, personal records
Frontend: Admin Running tab - Shows global stats (18.9 km total, 4 total runs, 1h45m total time, 1134 calories)
Frontend: Admin Running tab - Top Runners section shows Admin FitMax #1 with 18.9 km
Frontend: Admin Running tab - Recent Runs section shows all 4 runs with details
critical_code_review_comments: Running feature fully implemented with proper API endpoints and frontend components
Data persisted correctly in MongoDB running_sessions collection
Admin panel Running tab provides comprehensive overview of all users' running activity
context_for_next_testing_agent: Running feature complete. Backend endpoints: POST /api/running/log, GET /api/running/history, GET /api/running/stats, GET /api/running/{run_id}, DELETE /api/running/{run_id}, GET /api/admin/running/all, GET /api/admin/running/stats, GET /api/admin/running/user/{user_id}. Frontend: /running page with 3 tabs (Run, History, Stats), Admin panel has Running tab with global stats and user tracking.

features_verified.start_pause_stop_buttons: YES - START button visible, PAUSE and FINISH appear when running is started
features_verified.history_tab: YES - Shows run history with distance, time, pace, calories for each run
features_verified.stats_tab: YES - Shows total km, runs, time, calories, progress chart (Last 7 days), Personal Records (Longest run, Best pace)
features_verified.api_running_log: YES - POST /api/running/log creates new running session
features_verified.admin_running_tab: YES - Tab visible in Admin panel with icon
features_verified.admin_global_stats: YES - Shows total km, total runs, total time, calories burned
features_verified.admin_top_runners: YES - Shows ranked list of top runners with total distance
features_verified.admin_recent_runs: YES - Shows recent runs from all users with details
features_verified.admin_user_detail_click: YES - fetchUserRunning function available for viewing individual user running data
